name: @soltrade/wallet-rotation
description: Wallet Rotation orchestration (Gate D / D3): simulated composite flow over C0/C3/D1/D2 by dependency injection. In-memory, deterministic. rotate_execution_wallet -> PENDING; start -> IN_PROGRESS (drain old via C3 + create asset transfer via D1); complete_wallet_rotation -> COMPLETED only when transfer CONFIRMED (+ sweep if required) and old wallet retired; simulateFail -> FAILED. No live transfer/sweep; no token transfer; no funding; no signer creation; no admission gate; no KeyManager; no key material; no tx build/sign/send; no RPC; no DB; no REAL-LIVE; no execution authority.
